AE-SEC-001 Secrets

Secret detected in agent-visible context file

AGENTS.md:14
Evidence
OPENAI_API_KEY=sk-proj-•••• <redacted> & rotated
Remediation

Remove the key and reference it via an env var. Revoke the exposed key immediately.

Why this matters

No raw secret patterns in agent-visible files.

Why this matters

Every MCP server is pinned to an exact, current, non-deprecated version per the MCP catalog.
